name: openclaw-session-bridge-plugin
description: Tool-call acceleration for OpenClaw via MTClaw Function Router — up to 7x faster vertical-domain tool calls (100% Pass@1, 6.85x permissive mode). Forwards the OpenClaw session id to the router so per-session tool history works correctly. | 基于 MTClaw Function Router 的 OpenClaw 工具调用加速插件，定制领域工具调用最高加速 7 倍（严格模式 100% Pass@1，宽松模式 6.85 倍）。本插件将 OpenClaw session id 转发给 router，保证按会话隔离的工具历史正常工作。
